description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall, dense hedge, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The structure features a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The front area includes a covered patio with minimalist landscaping and geometric planters, while the rear boasts a spacious swimming pool, sun loungers, and a paved terrace for outdoor relaxation. The building's exterior is finished in white and light gray, with accents of natural wood and glass, contributing to its sleek, contemporary appearance. A driveway and carport are visible on one side, with a red vehicle parked underneath. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and clean architectural lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass windows, a private pool, and minimalist landscaping, enclosed by a tall hedge. The design features clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a mix of white, gray, and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, covered patio, and driveway with carport.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the swimming pool, sun loungers, and paved terrace, with the hedge providing privacy.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade with grouped windows, secondary patio, and the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, outdoor seating, and the clean, geometric landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on front and side facades
